en_title: The Invincible VS Devs Would Love a Mortal Kombat Crossover
cn_title: 《无敌少侠：对决》开发者渴望与《真人快打》联动
subtitle: 放马过来？
opus_summary: 《无敌少侠：对决》开发者在Evo 2026上表示，乐意与《真人快打》联动，但角色必须契合其暴力世界。团队还计划加入更多单人内容和角色新机制，但电影化故事模式暂无法保证。50人小团队正奋力为玩家提供更多内容。

paragraphs.en: The minds behind Invincible VS are open to collaborations with other genres and IPs, specifically in regards to welcoming potential guest characters from the Mortal Kombat franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 《无敌少侠：对决》的开发团队对与其他类型及IP展开合作持开放态度，尤其欢迎可能来自《真人快打》系列的客串角色。

paragraphs.en: We got the chance to sit down with Invincible VS’s Game Director, Dave Hall, and its Lead Combat Designer, Bau Bautista, at Evo 2026, where we asked them about the possibility of adding guest characters from completely different properties a la Street Fighter 6 and Tekken 8 .
paragraphs.cn: 在Evo 2026上，我们有机会采访了《无敌少侠：对决》的游戏总监Dave Hall与首席战斗设计师Bau Bautista，询问他们是否可能像《街头霸王6》和《铁拳8》那样，引入来自截然不同作品的客串角色。

paragraphs.en: Both Hall and Bautista enthusiastically welcomed the idea, but made sure to preface that the characters would have to reasonably fit within Invincible's world for such a crossover to make sense.
paragraphs.cn: Hall和Bautista都热情地接纳了这一想法，但首先强调，角色必须合理融入《无敌少侠》的世界观，这种跨界联动才有意义。

paragraphs.en: “I think for us, the Invincible universe is just such a beautiful, violent universe that they would have to fit that. I wouldn't want to put Mario or Luigi in there. That'd be cool, don't get me wrong, but I don't want to rip his head off,” Hall laughed.
paragraphs.cn: 「对我们来说，《无敌少侠》宇宙是如此美丽而暴力的一个世界，他们必须契合这种风格。我可不想把马里奥或路易吉放进来——那会很酷，别误会，可我不想把他的脑袋拧下来。」Hall笑着说。

paragraphs.en: This, of course, prompted us to suggest characters from the equally bloody Mortal Kombat universe, which received eager nods of approval from both developers. “NetherRealm, they’re the best. That would be incredible,” Hall said. “If there's an opportunity, I'm not going to say no to Scorpion, " Bautista added. "One of the things to keep in mind is, Invincible has a ton of guests and crossovers throughout the comics, so it's not outside the realm of possibility. If we have that opportunity, yes, I'm going to take that.”
paragraphs.cn: 这自然让我们提议加入同样血腥的《真人快打》角色，两位开发者立刻热切点头赞同。「NetherRealm，他们是最棒的。那会非常棒。」Hall说道。「如果有机会，我不会对蝎子说不。」Bautista补充道，「需要记住的是，《无敌少侠》漫画里本来就有大量客串和跨界内容，所以这并非不可能。要是有这个机会，我绝对会抓住。」

paragraphs.en: Guest characters are a hot topic within the fighting game community as of late, with Tekken 8 revealing Yujiro Hanma for Season Three and Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves adding Kenshiro to the fray this summer — not to mention Final Fantasy VII’s Tifa Lockhart making her way into Street Fighter 6 in early 2027. Mortal Kombat itself is a franchise famous for bringing in wild guest characters from other media genres, including the Xenomorph from Alien, The Boys' Homelander , and even Omni-Man himself.
paragraphs.cn: 客串角色近来在格斗游戏社区中是个热门话题，《铁拳8》刚刚揭晓第三季加入范马勇次郎，《饿狼传说：群狼之城》也将在今夏迎来拳四郎的参战，更不用说《最终幻想7》的蒂法·洛克哈特预计于2027年初登陆《街头霸王6》了。《真人快打》系列本就以引入其他媒体的疯狂客串角色而闻名，从《异形》中的异形，到《黑袍纠察队》的祖国人，甚至包括全能人本人。

paragraphs.en: It’s a trend that’s sweeping across the entire fighting game landscape right now, and one that the Invincible VS team is clearly open to joining if the stars align. And with the groundwork already laid in Mortal Kombat 1 , it's not a stretch to assume this crossover might come to fruition on Skybound's side.
paragraphs.cn: 这是当下席卷整个格斗游戏界的潮流，而《无敌少侠：对决》团队显然也愿意在时机成熟时加入。鉴于《真人快打1》已经在这方面打下基础，Skybound这边愿意促成这场联动也并非异想天开。

paragraphs.en: Outside of potential guest characters, the devs also let us in on a few more details regarding the game’s future, including the addition of more single-player content, continuing its story mode, and even adding new mechanics to characters from its base roster down the line.
paragraphs.cn: 除了潜在的客串角色，开发者还透露了游戏未来计划的更多细节，包括追加更多单人内容、继续推进故事模式，甚至后续为基础角色阵容追加新机制。

paragraphs.en: More specifically, Hall and Bautista mentioned Immortal’s 'revive' technique in keeping with his canonical status as, well, The Immortal. They revealed that they’d initially intended on giving such a mechanic to Atom Eve prior to launch, but simply felt that she wasn’t in a finished state to add yet another tool into her kit at the time.
paragraphs.cn: 更具体地说，Hall和Bautista提到了不朽者（Immortal）的「复活」技能，这符合其作为不朽者的官方设定。他们透露，原本计划在游戏发售前为原子伊芙（Atom Eve）加入类似机制，但当时觉得她的状态还不够完善，不适合再添加新技能。

paragraphs.en: “Some of the issues that we ran into early on with some of the other characters that are similar to Immortal, like Power Plex and even Eve, was that she was supposed to have a revive mechanic,” Bautista explained.
paragraphs.cn: Bautista解释道：「我们早期在开发不朽者这类角色时遇到的一些问题，比如Power Plex，甚至原子伊芙，她本应该有一个复活机制。」

paragraphs.en: “But there was too much to work through. I didn’t know if we could do this to the level and the quality that we needed to in time. So we were like, ‘Okay, let's focus now on what we can achieve and make sure she's solid as heck, and then come back to this mechanic.’
paragraphs.cn: 「但当时有太多事情需要处理。我不确定我们能否在期限内做到我们需要的水平和质量。所以我们说，‘好吧，我们现在专注于能实现的目标，确保她极其扎实，然后再回过头来考虑这个机制。’」

paragraphs.en: When asked if this was something they’d be willing to adding to her kit in future updates, Bautista seemed open to the idea once the game’s meta gets solidified by its playerbase.
paragraphs.cn: 当被问及是否愿意在未来的更新中为她添加这个机制时，Bautista似乎持开放态度，但前提是游戏的Meta先被玩家社群稳定下来。

paragraphs.en: “There’s always potential, especially once our meta starts to get more established,” he told us. “Who knows where we're going to push the game? There's all sorts of crazy opportunities. But one of the things we ran into is, once we shipped, our focus has been all about solidifying the foundation of the game. And so now that we're in a pretty solid state, now is the time for us to push things. We're like, ‘Hey, guess what? We've got a pretty solid roster of characters. We can push some new mechanics and ideas.’ And Universa and Immortal are the perfect opportunity for that.”
paragraphs.cn: 他告诉我们：「游戏总有潜力可挖，尤其是在我们的对战环境趋于稳定之后。谁知道我们会把游戏推向何方？各种疯狂的机会都有可能。但我们也遇到过一个情况，就是游戏发售后，我们的重点一直都在于巩固游戏的基础。所以现在基础已经相当稳固了，正是我们推进新内容的时候。我们就像是说，‘嘿，猜猜怎么着？我们已经有了一套很扎实的角色阵容，可以推出一些新机制和新点子了。’而Universa和Immortal就是实现这一点的绝佳机会。」

paragraphs.en: On top of adding new characters and mechanics to the game, the devs assured us that they are hyper-aware of any and all community feedback, whether that be comments sent from players in their official Discord server, posts on social media, and even suggestions in their DMs. “We listen to everything that's happening out there," Hall said. "We're constantly on top of every board, everything, and they're directly messaging us on many apps, so it's important for us. We need the players’ feedback. That's what we thrive on.
paragraphs.cn: 除了向游戏加入新角色和新机制外，开发者还向我们保证，他们极度重视所有社区反馈，无论是玩家通过官方Discord服务器发来的留言、社交媒体上的帖子，甚至是直接私信中的建议。Hall说道：「我们倾听外面发生的一切。我们时刻关注着各种留言板和所有动向，玩家还会通过许多应用直接给我们发消息，所以这对我们来说很重要。我们需要玩家的反馈，这就是我们赖以发展的东西。」

paragraphs.en: “We're very quick. We're kind of a real-time developer and if we see something's wrong, we're going to fix it as soon as we can. We're going to do a hot patch or anything of that nature. What we're kind of focused on right now is giving more to the players. So this is why we're going to keep pushing and getting more characters out there, getting some modes out there, getting our tournament scene going a little more. We're here for the future right now.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们行动非常迅速。我们算是实时响应的开发者，如果发现有什么问题，我们会尽快修复，可能会立即推出热修复补丁之类的。我们现在的重点在于为玩家提供更多内容，所以我们会继续推进，推出更多角色、更多模式，让我们的赛事场景更加活跃。我们当前所做的一切都是为了未来。」

paragraphs.en: Speaking of “getting modes out there,” the two devs assured us that they are “not done” with publishing more single-player content for Invincible VS, promising to add more content down the line.
paragraphs.cn: 说到「推出更多模式」，这两位开发者向我们保证，他们「还没做完」《无敌少侠：对决》的单人内容，并承诺后续会陆续加入更多内容。

paragraphs.en: However, Hall admitted that they couldn’t give “any reassurances” about continuing the cinematic story mode, which notably ended on a cliffhanger.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Hall坦言，他们无法对继续开发电影式剧情模式给出「任何保证」，毕竟该模式目前明显以悬念收尾。

paragraphs.en: “We are definitely working on things to get more single-player experience,” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们确实在努力为玩家提供更多单人体验。」他说道。

paragraphs.en: “It's an important thing for us to kind of push forward on. Like I said, we're trying to keep building the game. We're not done. We're moving as fast as we can to get more and more content out there for the players. Something to keep in mind, too, is that we're a tiny team. We're 50 people, so there's only so much we can do, but at the same time, we're trying to prioritize getting the most bang for our buck.”
paragraphs.cn: 这是我们着力推进的重点。就像我说的，我们还在持续开发这款游戏，还没做完。我们正以最快速度努力为玩家带来更多内容。还有一点需要说明：我们是个很小的团队，只有50人，因此能做的事有限。不过，我们也在努力把好钢用在刀刃上，优先追求最高效的产出。

paragraphs.en: Virginia (she/her) is IGN’s News Editor. With ten years of experience reporting on games and entertainment, she’s got a storied background in the fighting game community, influencer news, and viral online trends. Find her on Twitter at @TheeMissGlaze.
paragraphs.cn: Virginia（she/her）是IGN的新闻编辑。她拥有十年游戏和娱乐报道经验，以格斗游戏社区、网红新闻和网络流行趋势方面的深厚背景而闻名。可以在X上找到她 @TheeMissGlaze。

pending_dict.reason: 《真人快打》经典角色，中文社区常用“蝎子”
《无敌少侠》角色，漫画及动画常用译名“不朽者”
《无敌少侠》角色，常见译名“原子夏娃”
